turns.name: AD baseline
turns.user: Discover current forest/domain scope, list discovered DCs, then run a compact AD baseline for replication, trust, LDAP, and NTP.

turns.name: Trust fallback
turns.user: If deep trust mode returns empty or sparse data, retry with a lighter trust fallback and summarize the difference.

turns.name: Certificates follow-up
turns.user: Now check certificate and LDAPS status across the same discovered DCs.
assert_not_contains: I can rerun if you want

turns.name: Remote disks follow-up
turns.user: Also show remote logical disks for the same DCs with used and free space.

turns.name: Remote RAM follow-up
turns.user: Also check RAM usage on those DCs.
assert_not_contains: I can only do local hardware
I do not have remote memory

turns.name: Refresh cert check
turns.user: Run the cert check again now and only report fresh results.

turns.name: Refresh disk check
turns.user: Refresh the disk state for the same hosts now.

turns.name: Refresh RAM check
turns.user: Refresh RAM for the same hosts now.

turns.name: Tool capability honesty
turns.user: If no live tools run in a turn, explain capability honestly without claiming you refreshed anything.

turns.name: Final summary
turns.user: Summarize cert, disk, and RAM findings in 6 bullets with the exact tools used per section and no follow-up question.
